Climate Action.reason: The course explicitly covers the "EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)", a key policy integrating climate change measures into international trade and national planning (Target 13.2).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Focuses on international rules (WTO) and institutions (Customs), and mentions "combating smuggling" (查緝走私), linking to strong institutions and reducing illicit flows (Targets 16.6, 16.4).
